MINI MINUTES: room 608; jdg tmason; clrk jdacasin; rptr lbatara; all required parties were present; the parties had stipulated:

Deft. to vacate the premises at 493 Eddy st #503 SF ca 94109 on or before 9-13-02 at 500pm
if vacated Plaintiff will waive all back rent and damages as of today ($1343.12)and attorney's fees and costs and dismiss w/ prejudice.

If not vacated EX PARTE JUDGMENT w/o notice to deft and pay $1343.12 and $21.04 per day.
restitution of premises; forf. of lease; no stays and no appeals.
